task_completion.description: Create the Autopsy case with the specified name and number
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy GUI showing a new case being created or opened with the Case Name 'Backend_DB_Extraction_2024' and Case Number 'INV-SQL-001'.

task_completion.description: Add the suspect's USB drive image as a data source
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy GUI showing the data source '/home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd' successfully added to the case.

task_completion.description: Run ingest modules to calculate MD5 hashes
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy GUI showing ingest modules running or completed, specifically indicating that hash calculation (MD5) was enabled so the database populates the hashes.

task_completion.description: Query the Autopsy backend SQLite database directly
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal window running 'sqlite3' or a SQLite GUI tool (like DB Browser) open to the case's 'autopsy.db' file, showing a SQL query selecting 'name', 'size', and 'md5' from the 'tsk_files' table where 'md5' is not null.

task_completion.description: Export the query results to the specified CSV file with correct headers
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal, file manager, or text editor showing the file '/home/ga/Reports/custom_hash_export.csv' has been created, and its contents start with the exact headers 'name,size,md5'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually used Autopsy to process the image
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Autopsy GUI being interacted with to create the case and process the image, rather than the agent manually creating a fake database file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent extracted data via a genuine SQLite query
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a real SQLite client (CLI or GUI) executing the query against the Autopsy database, rather than the agent using a script to generate a fake CSV or echoing text directly into the file.

integrity.description: Verify the CSV contains actual extracted data
integrity.visual_evidence: The exported CSV file should contain multiple rows of realistic file names, sizes, and 32-character MD5 hashes, not just the headers or placeholder text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Case Name must be exactly 'Backend_DB_Extraction_2024'. Case Number must be 'INV-SQL-001'. Disk Image path is '/home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd'. The exported CSV must be saved to '/home/ga/Reports/custom_hash_export.csv' and the first line must contain exactly the headers 'name,size,md5'.
